name: Arcane Conduit
description: A small object infused by an elemental gem or similar arcane conduit used to be able to cast arcane spells.

name: Mystic Talisman
description: A small object containing a divine symbol or other spiritual relic infused with mystical power used to be able to cast mystic spells.

name: Arcane Wand
description: A wand imbued with arcane energy that holds a single arcane spell. Invoked as an Action following spell scroll rules.

name: Mystic Wand
description: A wand infused with mystic power that holds a single mystic spell. Invoked as an Action following spell scroll rules.

name: Arcane Staff
description: A staff imbued with arcane energy that holds multiple arcane spells. Requires Arcana skill to use. Invoked as an Action following spell scroll rules.

name: Mystic Staff
description: A staff infused with mystic power that holds multiple mystic spells. Requires Mysticism skill to use. Invoked as an Action following spell scroll rules.
